name: IRC_EMP_EVENT_ACTION_TRK
description: This table stores the details of the employee event actions tracking details

columns.Name: ACTION_TRACKING_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: EMP_EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores EMP_EVENT_ID. Foreign key to irc_emp_events_b table.

columns.Name: ACTION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores action types supported values are ORA_MSG and ORA_NOTIFICATION.

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the status as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type are ORA_NEW, ORA_INPROGRESS and ORA_COMPLETED.

columns.Name: START_TIME
columns.Comments: Stores employee event action start time.

columns.Name: END_TIME
columns.Comments: Stores employee event action end time.

columns.Name: SUCCESS_COUNT
columns.Comments: Stores the count of successful event sends.

columns.Name: FAILED_COUNT
columns.Comments: Stores the count of failed event sends.

columns.Name: REQUESTOR_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Stores REQUESTOR_PERSON_ID. Foreign Key to per_persons table.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_TIME
columns.Comments: Stores scheduled date for the event.

columns.Name: ERROR_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: Stores error details if any failures to send event.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
